events.organizer_description: Welcome to the Museum of American Heritage, otherwise known as MOAH!Discover inventions that shaped America displayed in a century-old home and garden! We combine elements of history technology and design to illustrate the evolution of technology, how and why it has influenced society from inception to the current time and a glimpse of future expectations. MOAH's collection of 5,000+ artifacts are displayed in our permanent and rotating exhibits which emphasize invention and technology from 1750-1950.

events.organizer_description: Welcome to AI Builders ! This meetup group is perfect for anyone interested in delving into the world of Artificial Intelligence.Whether you're looking to expand your knowledge on AI programming, discuss cutting-edge technologies, or collaborate with like-minded individuals, this is the perfect community for you.Join us for informative discussions, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities to further your understanding of AI and explore its vast potential. Let's come together to build a future powered by AI innovation!

events.name: Super Family Sunday - May 17 2026
events.description: Join us for this FREE event at the Junior Museum & Zoo for families who have children with disabilities
events.organizer_description: The Palo Alto Junior Museum & Zoo is a place where children and their caregivers come to explore, discover, create and play. Through hands-on science exhibits and a diverse community of live animals, your child's natural scientist will be nurtured. The experiences are developmentally designed for children ages birth to nine years old, but visitors of all ages are welcome.The Museum & Zoo also offers a menagerie of science programs for schools and community groups, as well as classes, summer camps and birthday parties for families.The mission of the Palo Alto Junior Museum & Zoo is to engage a child's curiosity in science and nature.

events.name: Guided Sadhana: Community Yoga and Meditation (Free and Open to all)
events.address: 2171 El Camino Real, Palo Alto, CA 94306
events.description: A free community guided Yoga and Meditation class at our yoga studio offered every week.
events.organizer_description: Ananda is Sanskrit for “joy.” We’re one of the largest and oldest centers for meditation training in northern California. Thousands have learned to meditate here over the past 50 years.Ananda is also one of the largest centers in the world for the teachings of Paramhansa Yogananda, author of the spiritual classic, Autobiography of a Yogi.

events.name: Stanford Sleep Apnea Course/Goode Lectureship
events.address: 500 Pasteur Drive 3 floor, Palo Alto, CA 94304
events.description: The Stanford Sleep Apnea Course makes its debut, presented by the Sleep Surgery Division of the Department of Otolaryngology
events.organizer_description: This course is a beginner to intermediate FEES course designed to provide foundational information in evaluation and  treatment of swallowing disorders using endoscopy.  There will be a “hands-on” session on Day 2 designed to give speech-language pathologists the opportunity to participate in techniques to optimize the instrumental examination.  The hands-on portion of the course will include MDs and expert SLPs.  To participate in the hands-on portion, you will be asked to volunteer to be scoped.  The lecture portion of the course consists of lectures, digital imaging, discussion, live demonstrations.  Don’t miss this opportunity to see and hear our impressive faculty.

events.name: U.S. Postal Service Job Fair - PALO ALTO
events.address: 2085 East Bayshore Road, East Palo Alto, CA 94303
events.description: USPS offers great benefits & advancement opportunities. Come to our job fair and we'll get you started on your new career and a new future!
events.organizer_description: THE USPS CONNECTS THE NATIONThe U.S. Postal Service is the only delivery service that reaches every address in the nation: 160 million residences, businesses and Post Office Boxes. The Postal Service receives no tax dollars for operating expenses and relies on the sale of postage, products and services to fund its operations.The USPS has more than 34,000 retail locations nationwide and our website, www.usps.com is the most frequently visited websites in the federal government.The Postal Service delivers 48 percent of the world’s mail. With more than 630,000 employees, we are one of the nation’s largest employers. And we have one of the world’s largest computer networks.Our strategic initiatives and continuous improvement efforts are guided by these goals:•	Deliver a world-class customer experience•	Equip, empower and engage employees•	Innovate faster to deliver value

events.name: Financial Literacy Workshop #5: Understanding Asset Accumulation Strategies
events.description: Wealth-Building 101: Asset Accumulation Strategies to Reach Your Goals!
events.organizer_description: Mr. Hamada holds the prestigious title ofCertified Financial Educator (CFEd®)with the Heartland Institute of Financial Education (www.hife-usa.org). He was recommended to the Institute based on his integrity and knowledge within the financial industry as a successful financial advisor and his education-based style of financial planning. He is one of only a few hundred active CFEd®’s in the United States and has taught classes to a wide variety of companies and organizations, including technology and medical companies as well as various churches and other groups.In addition to his role as a CFEd®, Mr. Hamada is also a Certified College Consultant through Heartland and works with college coaches throughout the United States to help mentor and assist college bound students through the college planning, admissions, and funding process.As a public speaker, Mr. Hamada has trained and lectured to various groups as well as at financial conventions exceeding 15,000 attendees.

events.name: Financial Literacy Workshop #4: Your Financial Health and Wealth
events.description: Estate & Healthcare Planning: Build a Future That Cares for All You Value!
events.organizer_description: Mr. Hamada holds the prestigious title ofCertified Financial Educator (CFEd®)with the Heartland Institute of Financial Education (www.hife-usa.org). He was recommended to the Institute based on his integrity and knowledge within the financial industry as a successful financial advisor and his education-based style of financial planning. He is one of only a few hundred active CFEd®’s in the United States and has taught classes to a wide variety of companies and organizations, including technology and medical companies as well as various churches and other groups.In addition to his role as a CFEd®, Mr. Hamada is also a Certified College Consultant through Heartland and works with college coaches throughout the United States to help mentor and assist college bound students through the college planning, admissions, and funding process.As a public speaker, Mr. Hamada has trained and lectured to various groups as well as at financial conventions exceeding 15,000 attendees.
